base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of battle_backgrounds — a tile from 1991 final fantasy iv. 16 battle-bg regions (Baron/Damcyan/Tower of Bab-il/Cave/Dungeon/Lunar/Space/etc.). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
